---
labels: ['mdx']
description: 'A MDX (v3) options for Bit component docs.'
---

A MDX (v3) options for Bit component docs.

It provides 2 different options:

1. `mdxOptions` - MDX options with Bit-flavoured setup. It's used for all the MDX docs for Bit components.
2. `basicMdxOptions` - A basic version of MDX options. It's used for the content in mdx envs.

```ts
import { mdxOptions, basicMdxOptions } from '@teambit/mdx.modules.mdx-v3-options';

{
  test: /\.mdx?$/,
  use: [
    {
      loader: '@mdx-js/loader',
      options: mdxOptions, // or basicMdxOptions
    },
  ],
}
```

It's also a replacement of the previous `@teambit/mdx.compilers.mdx-transpiler` which is only for MDX 1.x. And the difference is this module only provides the options. To compile your MDX content, you have to call `compile()`/`compileSync()` from `@mdx-js/mdx` instead of from the transpiler directly.
